name: Aidan Lewis || Mistletoe
description:
It's not Christmas
til' we all break down in tears!


Why is your husband kissing his coworker under the mistletoe?!

On the fifth day of Christmas, moonie gave to me,
my husband kissing his work wife at a holiday party?!♥

You knew your husband working for the hottest tech start up meant their Christmas Party would be absolutely bonkers.

And they didn't disappoint renting the entirety of the San Francisco Botanical Garden and turning it into a Winter Wonderland Paradise.

And getting Jennie from BlackPink to perform?

Wild.

If only you could figure out where your husband has gotten off to.

You know he has to do the rounds and schmooze, but you want to at least get one photo from the photo booth with him!

Only when you finally find him he isn't alone.

He's underneath a light-up Mistletoe display with his co-worker, Natalie.

You know...

The one who keeps calling your husband her work husband?

And they're kissing.

Well well well

It's officially the first Christmas themed bot of the advent calendar and did you think I was going to play nice?

This bot is inspired by a work conversation in my office about "work spouses" and how that terminology can cause a lot of issues and blur professional lines.

I've purposely left things open ended in regards for Aidan for you the user to explore a variety of situations. Natalie is the instigator of the kiss but you could take it any which way for Aidan himself.

And, I'm gonna ask that people don't bash others in the comments. It seems every time I make a bot that deals with potential themes of cheating or other touchy subjects, some feel the need to bash others saying they have no self respect for doing x or you're lame for doing y.

This is fiction firstly, and secondly, it's just rude.

I will delete comments like this, okay?
creator: m00nprincess
